ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region (e.g., UK, US, EU) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust_min" REAL /* Minimum bust measurement (in inches) */,
  "bust_max" REAL /* Maximum bust measurement (in inches) */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "hips_min" REAL /* Minimum hips measurement (in inches) */,
  "hips_max" REAL /* Maximum hips measurement (in inches) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the garment */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the garment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  "bust" REAL /* User's bust measurement (in inches) */,
  "waist" REAL /* User's waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "hips" REAL /* User's hips measurement (in inches) */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size based on user's measurements */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (on a scale of 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_region" INTEGER /* Preferred region for size conversion */,
  "preferred_category" INTEGER /* Preferred clothing category */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit used by the user (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_region FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_category FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size comparison entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust_min" REAL /* Minimum bust measurement (in inches) */,
  "bust_max" REAL /* Maximum bust measurement (in inches) */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "hips_min" REAL /* Minimum hips measurement (in inches) */,
  "hips_max" REAL /* Maximum hips measurement (in inches) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the garment */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_comparison_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_comparison_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the style belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size recommendation (if applicable) */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size comparison (if applicable) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES size_recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES size_comparison ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion performed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the size conversion was performed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for which the size conversion was performed */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date the size conversion was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the size recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the size recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_logs_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES size_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)
